text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I gave in to sweet temptation and ended up
getting dessert.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Lately, whenever I skip practice, I end up
snacking, and now my clothes are feeling tight...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, Sei! You about to have lunch? Mind if
I join you?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sure. Oh, see that dessert on the table? Go
ahead and help yourself.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sure am. Just a little something to say thanks for
everything you've done for me recently. ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm the one who should be thanking you. Drool...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Besides, seeing you eat that up like it's the most
delicious thing in the whole world...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I think it'll fill both my heart and my belly right
up.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What I'm getting at is... I'm looking forward to
doing this a whole bunch more!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What? You're planning on giving me even more?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! Keep the dessert coming forever and
ever! ...Uh, I mean, let's keep helping each other
out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By lunching with Special Week for a time, Seiun
Sky manages to stick to her diet.
